src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use the new Spring Security 6 API requiring a Customizer.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method `oauth2.jwt()` without arguments was removed in Spring Security 6; calling it causes a compilation error because the API now requires a `Customizer<JwtAuthenticationConverter>` argument.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add static import for Spring Security Customizer to support the updated API call.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The identifier `withDefaults` is undefined without this import, causing a compilation error.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace static import of String.format with the String.formatted() instance method introduced in Java 15.
src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While String.format still exists, the migration intent is to adopt the newer Java 15+ API style; strictly speaking, the old code compiles on Java 21, but this change is part of the JDK modernization pattern.
